body_preview: - Graph pressure #1: bash_tool_error=12 — highest-count recurring tool failure category in state evidence. - `git grep -n pipefail src/tools.rs` returns zero matches. The `StreamingBashTool::execute` method at line 477 runs `bash -c <command>` without `set -o pipefail`, so pipe failures (e.g., `rg ... | head -20` where rg exits non-zero) are silently masked.
expected_evidence: In future state events, bash_tool_error count decreases. Agent retry loops trigger on genuine pipe failures instead of proceeding with partial output. Dashboard tool-failure reconciliation shows fewer bash exit-code failures.
title: Harden bash tool with pipefail and bounded command prefix
